title: Helping States Tackle Technical Issues
summary: State legislatures need better access to scientific and technological expertise to make more informed decisions in the face of rapid and dramatic technological change. Ways to give state legislatures access to better information, including state universities, are discussed.
body: State legislatures need better access to scientific and technological expertise to make more informed decisions in the face of rapid and dramatic technological change. Ways to give state legislatures access to better information, including state universities, are discussed. To view full text please see PDF below (login may be required).
